authorities.decision_strategy: Wait for emotional clarity over time (full wave cycle)
authorities.description: Emotional authority requires riding the emotional wave before making decisions. No truth in the now - clarity comes with time.
authorities.time_frame: Days to weeks depending on wave

authorities.description: Immediate gut response that is reliable in the present moment. Sacral sounds (yes/no) provide clear direction.

authorities.decision_strategy: Trust spontaneous intuitive knowing in the moment
authorities.description: Instantaneous intuitive awareness that speaks once. Must be trusted in the moment or the opportunity passes.

authorities.decision_strategy: Make decisions based on what you want and what you'll commit to
authorities.description: Heart-centered authority for manifested decisions. Trust what your willpower commits to.
prerequisites: EMOTION, LIFEFORCE, and INTUITION centers undefined

subtypes.Ego Projected: Heart defined but not connected to Throat

authorities.decision_strategy: Hear yourself speak truth through conversation with trusted others
authorities.description: Identity speaks through the throat. Clarity comes through hearing your own voice in dialogue.
prerequisites: EMOTION, LIFEFORCE, INTUITION, and WILLPOWER centers undefined

authorities.decision_strategy: Process thoughts through trusted advisors - outer authority
authorities.description: Mental authority requires sounding board of trusted others. Never decide from the mind alone.
prerequisites: No motor or awareness centers defined

authorities.decision_strategy: Wait a full lunar cycle (28 days) and sample environment
authorities.description: Reflector-only authority. Wait 28 days through full moon cycle while discussing with trusted advisors.
authorities.note: Also called 'None' authority - Reflectors have no internal authority

centers.defined_description: Consistent pressure to act and get things started or done. Reliable motor energy for beginning new cycles and handling stress. Can manage pressure naturally.
centers.function: Pressure to evolve, stress, and adrenaline-fueled motor energy. Drive to begin and complete cycles.
questions: What is the pressure I'm feeling?
Am I rushing to relieve pressure?
Is this my pressure or someone else's?
centers.undefined_description: Takes in and amplifies pressure from environment. Rushes to relieve pressure that isn't yours. May hurry or feel pressured unnecessarily. Wisdom in not being rushed and understanding pressure is temporary.

centers.defined_description: Consistent emotional wave and motor energy. Natural emotional authority and depth. Ride emotional waves from hope to pain - no truth in the now, only over time. Most powerful motor and awareness center.
centers.function: Emotions, feelings, passion, and depth. Motor for emotional experiences and emotional awareness over time.
questions: Do I have emotional clarity over time?
centers.undefined_description: Takes in and amplifies emotional energy from environment. Empathic and sensitive to others' emotions. Can feel emotionally overwhelmed. Wisdom in avoiding confrontation and releasing emotions that aren't yours.

centers.defined_description: Consistent mode of communication and manifestation. Natural ability to express and take action. Voice that manifests thoughts, feelings, or identity into the world.
centers.function: Communication, manifestation, and action. Where internal experiences become external reality through voice and action.
questions: What am I here to communicate?
When should I speak or act?
centers.undefined_description: Flexible communication style that adapts to others. Takes in and amplifies voices around you. Can speak for others but may not know what to say for yourself. Wisdom in listening and speaking only when truly moved.

centers.defined_description: Fixed sense of identity, direction, and love. Know who you are and where you're going. Consistent self-expression and life direction.
centers.function: Love, identity, and direction. Core of self and life path. Magnetic monopole that holds us in our geometry.
questions: Where is love in my life?
centers.undefined_description: Fluid and flexible sense of self and direction. Take in and sample different identities and directions. May feel lost or search for identity. Wisdom in being comfortable with not knowing who you are or where you're going.

centers.defined_description: Consistent mental pressure and inspiration. Fixed way of being inspired and pressured to answer questions. Can handle mental pressure without overwhelm.
centers.function: Mental pressure to inspire thinking and questioning. Source of inspiration and mental contemplation.
centers.undefined_description: Takes in and amplifies mental pressure from others. Flexible in inspiration and questioning. Can become overwhelmed trying to answer unanswerable questions. Wisdom in not knowing.

centers.defined_description: Consistent intuitive awareness and instinct for survival. Natural capacity for spontaneous knowing in the moment. Reliable body-centered intelligence and health awareness.
centers.function: Survival, health, intuition, and spontaneous awareness in the now. Body-centered existential intelligence.
questions: What is my intuition telling me?
Am I holding onto what's not healthy?
centers.undefined_description: Inconsistent intuitive hits. Takes in and samples different survival strategies. May hold onto what's not healthy. Wisdom in recognizing intuition speaks once and not holding onto people or things.

centers.defined_description: Consistent life force energy and power to work. Pure generator energy - sustainable when responding to what you love. Natural capacity for mastery through repetition. Most powerful motor for sustained work.
centers.function: Life force, sexuality, work energy, and vitality. Motor for sustaining work and generating energy through response.
questions: Am I working at what I love?
centers.undefined_description: No consistent access to life force or work energy. Not designed for exhausting work - need to use energy wisely. Takes in sacral energy from others. Wisdom in knowing when to stop and rest.

centers.defined_description: Fixed and reliable way of processing and conceptualizing information. Consistent mental awareness and thinking patterns. Trustworthy mental perspective.
centers.function: Conceptualization, research, opinions, and mental awareness. Processes and organizes thoughts and information.
centers.undefined_description: Flexible mental processing that takes in multiple perspectives. Can see things in many different ways. Mental openness but potential for mental uncertainty. Wisdom in not being attached to fixed concepts.

centers.defined_description: Consistent willpower, self-worth, and ability to make commitments. Natural access to promises and tribe leadership. Knows own value and can commit reliably.
centers.function: Willpower, ego strength, self-worth, and tribal commitments. Motor energy for making and keeping promises.
centers.undefined_description: Inconsistent willpower and sense of self-worth. Takes in and amplifies ego energy from others. May try to prove worth or make promises that can't be kept. Wisdom in not making commitments or proving anything.

definitions.calculation: Graph traversal shows all defined centers form a single connected component through channels
definitions.description: All defined centers are connected in one continuous definition. Consistent and reliable energy flow throughout the chart.
definitions.implications: Most consistent definition type. Fixed and reliable in how energy flows. May have difficulty understanding split definition types.

definitions.bridge_note: The split creates a magnetic attraction to what bridges it - people, experiences, or environments that connect the two parts
definitions.calculation: Graph traversal shows exactly two separate connected components of defined centers
definitions.description: Two separate areas of definition in the chart. Need something external to bridge the gap between the two parts.
definitions.implications: Need others, transits, or specific environments to bridge the split. May feel incomplete alone. More flexible than single definition.

definitions.calculation: Graph traversal shows exactly three separate connected components of defined centers
definitions.description: Three separate areas of definition in the chart. Need multiple bridges to connect all parts.
definitions.implications: Highly flexible and adaptable. Need variety of people and experiences to feel whole. Can be the most flexible definition type.

definitions.calculation: Graph traversal shows four separate connected components of defined centers
definitions.description: Four separate areas of definition in the chart. Maximum fragmentation requiring multiple bridges.
definitions.implications: Extremely rare and highly flexible. Need diverse environments and connections to integrate all parts. Most adaptable definition type.

definitions.calculation: No gates activated, therefore no centers defined and no connected components
definitions.description: No definition - all centers open. Reflector only.
definitions.implications: Completely open to conditioning. Samples and reflects environment. Lunar cycle timing for major decisions.

metadata.description: Human Design ontology generated from YAML sources

profiles.archetype: The researcher who tests theories in practice
profiles.conscious_theme: Foundation - Need for investigation and solid knowledge base
profiles.description: Introspective investigator who learns through direct experience. Needs security of knowledge combined with resilience from experimentation.
profiles.life_path: Building foundations through investigation while learning what doesn't work
profiles.name: Investigator/Martyr
profiles.unconscious_theme: Experimentation - Learning through trial and error

profiles.conscious_theme: Foundation - Need for investigation and solid knowledge base
profiles.description: Investigator with natural networking ability. Solid knowledge shared through trusted relationships.
profiles.life_path: Deep investigation shared through network of trusted connections
profiles.name: Investigator/Opportunist

profiles.archetype: The talented hermit called out by their network
profiles.conscious_theme: Hermit - Natural genius that needs alone time
profiles.description: Natural talent that emerges through recognition. Balance between withdrawal and social networking.
profiles.life_path: Alternating between solitude and social engagement, called by the right people
profiles.name: Hermit/Opportunist

profiles.archetype: The natural genius with universal reputation to manage
profiles.conscious_theme: Hermit - Natural genius that needs alone time
profiles.description: Natural talent with universal reputation. Must manage projections while honoring need for solitude.
profiles.life_path: Balancing natural gifts with others' projections and expectations
profiles.name: Hermit/Heretic
profiles.unconscious_theme: Projection - Others project expectations onto you

profiles.archetype: The practical problem-solver discovered through trial and error
profiles.conscious_theme: Experimentation - Learning through trial and error
profiles.description: Resilient experimenter with practical solutions for others. Learns through direct experience while managing projections.
profiles.life_path: Finding what works through experimentation while meeting others' expectations for solutions
profiles.name: Martyr/Heretic
profiles.unconscious_theme: Projection - Others project expectations onto you

profiles.archetype: The evolving role model who learns through experience
profiles.conscious_theme: Experimentation - Learning through trial and error
profiles.description: Experimental first phase leading to wisdom and role modeling later in life. Three distinct life phases.
profiles.life_path: Phase 1 (0-30): Experimentation, Phase 2 (30-50): On the roof observing, Phase 3 (50+): Embodied role model

life_phases.phase_1: Birth to Saturn Return (~30 years): Trial and error experimentation
life_phases.phase_2: Saturn Return to Chiron Return (~30-50 years): Withdrawal and observation
life_phases.phase_3: Chiron Return onward (~50+ years): Living example and role model

life_phases.phase_2: Saturn Return to Chiron Return (~30-50 years): Selective networking

quarters.description: Quarter of initiation through mental awareness and understanding. Gates that initiate through thought and concept.
quarters.name: Initiation
quarters.purpose: Initiate through mind and mental awareness

quarters.description: Quarter of civilization through material form and manifestation. Gates that build structure and form in the world.
quarters.name: Civilization
quarters.purpose: Manifest through form and material world

quarters.description: Quarter of duality through relationships and bonds with others. Gates that connect and relate.
quarters.name: Duality
quarters.purpose: Fulfill purpose through relationship and bonding

quarters.description: Quarter of mutation through transformation and change. Gates that mutate and transform consciousness.
quarters.name: Mutation

rules: Motor center connected to Throat (channels 12-22, 35-36, or via channel from Heart/Solar Plexus/Sacral/Root to Throat)
Sacral NOT defined OR defined but motor-to-throat connection bypasses Sacral response
At least one motor (Heart, Solar Plexus, Sacral, Root) defined

types.description: Independent initiators designed to impact and catalyze change. Natural leaders who work best when informing others before taking action.

rules: NO motor-to-throat connection (distinguishes from Specialist/Manifesting Generator)

types.description: Life force energy that powers the world. Designed to respond to life and find satisfaction through doing work they love.

rules: Motor-to-throat connection present (can manifest after responding)
Combination of Generator's sacral response and Manifestor's initiating capacity

types.description: Multi-talented hybrid type combining Generator response with Manifestor initiation. Designed to respond, then move quickly into action.
types.strategy: Wait to respond, then inform before acting

rules: At least one energy center defined (not a Reflector)
Designed to guide and manage others' energy

types.description: Natural guides and coordinators designed to see the big picture and direct others' energy. Most successful when recognized and invited.
Rare mirrors of their environment with all centers undefined. Designed to sample and reflect the energy around them.
types.strategy: Wait a lunar cycle (28 days) for major decisions
